title: Vanguard Protocol
description: A cinematic five-character combat roster with animated fighters and reactive tactical staging.

prompt.objective: Build a tactical archive for selecting and inspecting five animated sci-fi combatants.

mintAssets.brief: Five distinct humanoid combatants in a coherent pack; T-pose, frontal, empty hands, and riggable.
Discover and apply a curated idle or combat set; never guess IDs.

experience: Select a fighter from a five-slot roster and orbit the central model.
Sync dossier copy, lighting, and accent effects to the selection.
prompt.visualDirection: Dark tactical sci-fi UI with violet energy, sparse grids, and condensed type.

thumbnail.alt: Nyx-7 displayed in the Vanguard Protocol combat roster

social.title: Vanguard Protocol
social.description: Choose and inspect five animated combatants in a reactive sci-fi staging system.
